Uses of Class
com.irurueta.units.Surface

    • Uses of Surface in com.irurueta.units

      Methods in com.irurueta.units that return Surface 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      Surface Surface.addAndReturnNew​(double value, SurfaceUnit unit, SurfaceUnit resultUnit)
      Adds provided surface value and unit and returns a new surface instance using provided unit.
      static Surface Surface.addAndReturnNew​(Surface arg1, Surface arg2, SurfaceUnit unit)
      Adds two surfaces.
      Surface Surface.addAndReturnNew​(Surface s, SurfaceUnit unit)
      Adds provided surface to current instance and returns a new surface.
      Surface Surface.addAndReturnNew​(java.lang.Number value, SurfaceUnit unit, SurfaceUnit resultUnit)
      Adds provided surface value and unit and returns a new surface instance using provided unit.
      static Surface SurfaceConverter.convertAndReturnNew​(Surface input, SurfaceUnit outputUnit)
      Converts a surface to requested output unit.
      Surface SurfaceFormatter.parse​(java.lang.String source)
      Parses provided string and tries to determine a surface value and unit.
      Surface Surface.subtractAndReturnNew​(double value, SurfaceUnit unit, SurfaceUnit resultUnit)
      Subtracts provided surface value and unit and returns a new surface instance using provided unit.
      static Surface Surface.subtractAndReturnNew​(Surface arg1, Surface arg2, SurfaceUnit unit)
      Subtracts two surfaces.
      Surface Surface.subtractAndReturnNew​(Surface s, SurfaceUnit unit)
      Subtracts provided surface to current instance and returns a new surface.
      Surface Surface.subtractAndReturnNew​(java.lang.Number value, SurfaceUnit unit, SurfaceUnit resultUnit)
      Subtracts provided surface value and unit and returns a new surface instance using provided unit.

      Modifier and Type Method Description
      void Surface.add​(Surface surface)
      Adds provided surface and updates current distance.
      void Surface.add​(Surface s, Surface result)
      Adds provided surface and stores the result into provided surface.
      static void Surface.add​(Surface arg1, Surface arg2, Surface result)
      Adds two surfaces and stores the result into provided instance.

      Adds two surfaces.

      Adds provided surface to current instance and returns a new surface.

      Converts a surface to provided output surface unit.

      Converts and updates a surface to requested output unit.

      Converts a surface to requested output unit.
      static Surface SurfaceConverter.convertAndReturnNew​(Surface input, SurfaceUnit outputUnit)
      Converts a surface to requested output unit.
      void Surface.subtract​(Surface surface)
      Subtracts provided surface and updates current surface.
      void Surface.subtract​(Surface s, Surface result)
      Subtracts provided surface and stores the result into provided surface.
      static void Surface.subtract​(Surface arg1, Surface arg2, Surface result)
      Subtracts two surfaces and stores the result into provided instance.

      Subtracts two surfaces.
